title: Guess the middle first
narration: If the secret number is between 1 and 10, the smartest first guess is the middle.
callout: Starting in the middle gives the strongest first clue.

title: Too low means go right
narration: If the helper says 5 is too low, the secret number must be bigger, so we keep the right half.
decision: Too low, so move left up to 6.

title: Too high means go left
narration: If 8 is too high, the secret number must be smaller. Now the middle lands on 6, which is correct.
decision: Too high, so move right down and guess 6 next.
